mapper.select: SELECT ma.* FROM dorm_move_apply ma LEFT JOIN dorm_bed db ON ma.original_bed_id = db.bed_id LEFT JOIN dorm_room dr ON db.room_id = dr.room_id WHERE dr.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY ma.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_move_apply (student_id, original_bed_id, target_bed_id, apply_reason, apply_time, audit_status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{originalBedId}, #{targetBedId}, #{applyReason}, #{applyTime}, #{auditStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_move_apply WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND audit_status = 0

SELECT ma.* FROM dorm_move_apply ma LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ma.student_id = su.user_id
su.is_deleted = 0
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')
AND ma.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY ma.apply_time DESC
